passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Provides a 50% off discount for up to four people. A discount code will be emailed to you which can be used when purchasing tickets online.
The code can be used throughout the entire 2026 season, which is listed below:
Georges Island
May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays
June 16 - September 1: every day
Spectacle Island
source_phrases: Provides a 50% off discount for up to four people. A discount code will be emailed to you which can be used when purchasing tickets online.
The code can be used throughout the entire 2026 season, which is listed below:
Georges Island
May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays
June 16 - September 1: every day
Spectacle Island
July 15 - September 1: every day
September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays
September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays
Peddocks Island from Hingham
June 15 - September 7: every day BUT Tuesdays
September 10 - October 12: Thursdays through Sundays
This is a coupon pass that will be emailed and can be printed or displayed on your mobile screen.

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
source_phrases: Single coupon provides FREE admission for up to four visitors.
Does not provide access to Harvard Art Museums.
This is a non-returnable coupon pass that must be picked up at the Main Library Circulation Desk after it is reserved.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
source_phrases: Half-price admission for up to 6 individuals.
Cannot be combined with a group tour plan. Not valid for special events.
This is a coupon code that will be emailed to you to use ordering tickets online. Follow the instructions in the email to recieve your discount.

passes.title: Heritage Museums And Gardens
source_phrases: Pass admits 2 people at $10.00 per person.
Valid only for the date listed on this pass.
This is a coupon pass that will be emailed and can be printed or displayed on your mobile screen.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits 4 people at $5 per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted free.
This is a coupon pass that will be emailed and can be printed or displayed on your mobile screen.
source_phrases: This pass admits 4 people at $5 per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted free.
This is a coupon pass that will be emailed and can be printed or displayed on your mobile screen.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass entitles bearer to free parking for one vehicle (excluding buses or vans). Please visit the Massachusetts State Parks online (https://www.mass.gov/guides/visiting-massachusetts-state-parks-guide) to learn all the locations that you can use this parking pass.
This is a circulating pass that must be checked out and returned to the library. Instructions will be emailed to you upon reservation.
source_phrases: Pass entitles bearer to free parking for one vehicle (excluding buses or vans). Please visit the Massachusetts State Parks online (https://www.mass.gov/guides/visiting-massachusetts-state-parks-guide) to learn all the locations that you can use this parking pass.
This is a circulating pass that must be checked out and returned to the library. Instructions will be emailed to you upon reservation.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
source_phrases: Each promo code provides up to two adults with $15 admission per person and four youths (ages 7–17) with $10 admission per person.
Tickets to the MFA are always free for visitors under seven years old.
Valid only for the date listed on this pass.
This is a coupon pass that will be emailed and can be printed or displayed on your mobile screen.

passes.title: New Bedford Whaling Museum
source_phrases: Fall-Spring (Septemper 2, 2025 through May 22, 2026):
Pass admits up to 4 people at 50% off the cost of admission.
Summer (May 26, 2026 through September 4, 2026, weekdays only):
Pass admits up to four people (adult, senior, child, or college) at a cost of $20 each. Children under age 3 are not included in the admission count and are always admitted free.
This is a coupon pass that will be emailed and can be printed or displayed on your mobile screen.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 2 people at $12 each.
Valid only for the date listed on this pass.
Reservations must be made in advance by visiting the Peabody Essex Museum website and using the promo code shown below the barcode on your pass.
This is a coupon code that will be emailed to you to use ordering tickets online. Follow the instructions in the email to recieve your discount.

passes.title: Plimoth Patuxet Museums
passes.benefit_text: Present it at the Sandwich Glass Museum's Admissions Desk for a 50% discount on general admission for up to two adults.
source_phrases: Present it at the Sandwich Glass Museum's Admissions Desk for a 50% discount on general admission for up to two adults.

passes.title: Sandwich Glass Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits up to 9 people for free.
Valid only for the date listed on this pass.
This is a coupon pass that will be emailed and can be printed or displayed on your mobile screen.
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 9 people for free.
Valid only for the date listed on this pass.
This is a coupon pass that will be emailed and can be printed or displayed on your mobile screen.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Coupon admits up to six guests at $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child . Children under two years old are free. 
This is a non-returnable coupon pass that must be picked up at the Main Library Circulation Desk after it is reserved.
